title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## An overview of progress on the potential use of administrative data for census information in New Zealand: Census Transformation programme
Provides an overview of early investigations into the potential use of administrative data sources for census information. Part of our Census Transformation programme.

## Post-enumeration survey: 2013
The Post-enumeration Survey measures the level of national coverage (undercount and overcount) for each Census of Population and Dwellings.

## 2013 Census counted over 97 percent of population
The 2013 Census counted 97.6 percent of the population, Statistics New Zealand said today.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about culture and identity
2013 Census information about New Zealand's increasingly diverse population. Find out more about ethnic groups in New Zealand, birthplace and people born overseas, languages spoken, religious affiliation.

## 2013 Census meshblock dataset
Contains counts at meshblock and other geographic levels for selected variables from the 2013, 2006, and 2001 Censuses. The geographies correspond to 2013 Census boundaries. The counts are at the highest level of each variable’s classification.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about housing
Information about a variety of topics related to housing in New Zealand, at both a national and regional level.

## 2013 Census – Spotlight on greater Christchurch
This infographic highlights some of the key changes in greater Christchurch since the 2006 Census.

## Forecasting mortality in New Zealand
Summarises the investigation of a new method for formulating mortality assumptions (ie forecasting mortality) that was implemented in official New Zealand population projections in 2012.

## 2013 Census data user guide
This guide answers some of the common questions about the collection, processing, interpretation, and use of 2013 Census data.

## Tatauranga 2013 Ngā Tauanga Tere mō te Māori
Ka whakarato Tatauranga 2013 Ngā Tauanga Tere mō te Māori i ngā meka whaitake ki a koe mō ngā tāngata Māori e noho ana i Aotearoa, ka whakaatu hoki i ngā panoni ki te ora o taua rōpū matawaka mai i te tau 2006.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about Māori
Information about Māori people living in New Zealand, and how life has changed for this ethnic group since 2006.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about national highlights
Information about demographic, social, and economic subjects at a national level.
